team.name: Coordinator
team.roleDesc: Manages the Shared Consciousness state and directs work distribution across the fleet. Resolves blockers and enforces team protocols.

team.name: Claude Code
team.roleDesc: Primary engineer for high-precision code generation, algorithmic optimization, and complex feature implementation.

team.name: Gemini
team.roleDesc: Master of massive context windows and cross-project knowledge synthesis. Manages secrets, vaults, and platform stability.

team.name: Codex
team.roleDesc: Ensures delivery velocity through automated testing, API prototyping, and CI/CD maintenance. Validates all fleet output.

projects.title: Agentic CRM Prototype
projects.summary: (Sample Project) Our definitive 'Northstar' test case—similar to the Northwind example. A high-fidelity React/FastAPI prototype managed autonomously by the fleet to demonstrate cross-platform coordination and Google Calendar integration.
